{# reviews.html — Vendor reviews section with add/delete. Receives: reviews (list[VendorReview]), vendor (VendorCard), user (User). Called by: htmx_views.py vendor_reviews / add_vendor_review routes. Depends on: HTMX, Tailwind CSS with brand palette. #}

Reviews ({{ reviews|length }})

{# Add review form #}
{% if reviews %}
{% for r in reviews %}
{% for i in range(r.rating or 0) %}★{% endfor %}{% for i in range(5 - (r.rating or 0)) %}★{% endfor %} {{ r.user.name if r.user else 'Unknown' }} {% if r.created_at %} {{ r.created_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y') }} {% endif %}
{% if r.comment %}

{{ r.comment }}

{% endif %}
{% if r.user_id == user.id %} {% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% else %}

No reviews yet. Be the first to review this vendor.

{% endif %}
